Selected Work

Projects

ML · Full Stack · Healthcare

AI-Powered Medical Lab Platform

GitHub

Bachelor graduation project — a full-stack healthcare platform (Deep Lab) integrating ML models for diagnostic automation, with appointment booking, specialist finder, and patient dashboard.

  • Blood-analysis ML models predict conditions such as anaemia from structured diagnostic data
  • Patient dashboard with appointment history, scan upload, and real-time status tracking
  • Django REST API backend consumed by a React + Tailwind CSS frontend
  • PostgreSQL schema managing patients, appointments, and diagnostic records
PythonTensorFlowDjango RESTPostgreSQLReactTailwind CSS
NLP · Data Analysis · Text Classification

Fake News Detection

GitHub

End-to-end NLP classification pipeline on the LIAR dataset — from exploratory analysis to benchmarking multiple ML classifiers with a full evaluation report.

  • Comprehensive EDA uncovering distribution patterns across truthfulness labels and speaker profiles
  • Full NLP preprocessing pipeline with TF-IDF feature engineering and structured metadata
  • Benchmarked Logistic Regression, Naïve Bayes, and SVM with comparative precision/recall analysis
PythonScikit-learnNLTKTF-IDFPandasMatplotlib
Machine Learning · Unsupervised · Academic

Unsupervised Learning Pipeline

GitHub

Reproducible ML lab implementing clustering, dimensionality reduction, and anomaly detection on real-world datasets — with side-by-side algorithm comparisons and inline analysis.

  • K-Means (k=5) customer segmentation with elbow-method optimisation and centroid visualisation
  • One-Class SVM vs Isolation Forest decision boundary comparison — 20/20 true outliers flagged
  • PCA dimensionality reduction for 2D visualisation of high-dimensional data
PythonScikit-learnNumPyPandasMatplotlibSeabornJupyter

Background

About Me

I'm a Data Science & Intelligent Systems M2 student at Université de Constantine 2, Algeria. My focus is building systems where data analysis and backend engineering meet — applications that don't just process data but act on it intelligently.

My background spans ML pipeline development, RESTful backend architecture, and Big Data processing. I've worked across healthcare AI, NLP, and distributed systems, always with a focus on clean, reproducible code and real-world impact.

I'm actively looking for data analyst, ML engineer, or backend developer roles — open to Algerian positions, remote European opportunities, and freelance contracts.
